name: ExclusionListExtr_EE

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(TASK_SUBJ_NM)) AS SUBJECT, LTRIM(RTRIM(TASK_NM)) AS TASK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_TASK_EXCL WHERE TASK_SUBJ_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), cte_2 AS (SELECT SUBJECT, ';' + STRING_AGG(TASK, ';') + ';' AS TASKLIST FROM cte_1 GROUP BY SUBJECT) SELECT SUBJECT, TASKLIST FROM cte_2

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:    ExclusionListExtr


DESCRIPTION:   Extract the records for a subject from the DB2 - W_TASK_EXCL table.
      

INPUTS:	 Subject name

  
HASH FILES:  TASK_EXCL


TRANSFORMS:  None
                        
   
PROCESSING:   Task rows from DB2 table are concatenated together with a semi-colon delimiter.  Each row overwrites the previous row in the TASK_EXCL UV table.  The last entry is the combination of all DB2 entries.
 

OUTPUTS:  A semi-colon delimited string of tasks to exclude for a subject.
                    


MODIFICATIONS:
              B Leland           05/25/2005  -  Initial programming


===============================================

Annotations:
Extract subject records from W_TASK_EXCL and Loads into TASK_EXCL file

Job Name:
IdsEdwExclusionListExtr
Read TASK_SUBJ_NM,TASK_NM fields from W_TASK_EXCL table  from IDS.
This file has Job names which are supposed to skip from run cycle.

Job names from file TASK_EXCL are pulled in sequencer going further.
Concat TASKLIST
